title: ourisia sessilifolia
intro: Ourisia sessilifolia, also known as Rock Daisy or Blue-eyed Daisy, is a perennial plant species native to New Zealand. It has been used in traditional Maori medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it effective in treating wounds and skin irritations. The health benefits of Ourisia sessilifolia include its ability to soothe and calm the skin, reducing inflammation and promoting tissue repair. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in teas, infusions, and topical applications, such as salves and creams, to leverage its medicinal properties.
